hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then cd /Users/dkrizanovic/projects/collaborativegherkin && result=$(npm test -- --run 2>&1); code=$?; if [ $code -ne 0 ]; then echo "$result" >&2; printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Tests failed — fix all failing tests before committing."}'; fi; fi
